findings.raw_evidence: API request req-7b2e4d91 returned HTTP 200 for masked account A-55** outside the authenticated ownership context.
Web host WEB-EBANK-01 opened outbound HTTPS to 198.51.100.42 shortly after the API authorization anomaly.
No related IAM, PAM, ATM, or MFA abnormality visible in the supplied window.

unrelated_findings.reason: Agent C reported no related IAM, PAM, ATM, or MFA abnormality in the supplied window.

correlation_rationale: Agent B and Agent A are merged because they share concrete entity links: WEB-EBANK-01, req-7b2e4d91, 198.51.100.42, and masked account A-55**.
The API authorization anomaly and outbound HTTPS flow occurred within the same three-minute window and form a plausible exploitation-to-egress chain.
This grouping is not based on worker count or time overlap alone; API gateway and network-flow verification both matched the linked entities.

verification_sources.matched_observation: API gateway recorded HTTP 200 for a masked account object outside authenticated ownership context.
Network flow recorded outbound HTTPS from WEB-EBANK-01 to 198.51.100.42 within two minutes of the API anomaly.

rationale: Independent logs confirm the API anomaly and outbound follow-on activity.

verified_case.title: Confirmed eBanking API compromise chain with outbound follow-on activity
verified_case.summary: Layer 1 findings and independent Layer 2 logs describe correlated public API abuse and outbound host activity involving the eBanking path.
assumptions: The account ownership reference used by Agent B is current.

scoring.score_table_calibration_reason: Ingress tool transfer is near-critical because it commonly enables follow-on compromise.
scoring.risk_cap_reason: L2 verification confirmed strong evidence; no restrictive cap below 10.0 is applied.
score_rationale: T1190 on public eBanking API plus T1105 follow-on activity forms a high-risk chain.
Public customer-data API raises asset criticality.
Layer 2 independent logs confirm the attack chain with strong verification.

impact_rationale: The affected path is an eBanking customer account details API.
Customer data is at risk; bulk exfiltration is not yet confirmed.

containment_gate_rationale: Layer 2 verification is strong and the risk threshold is met.
SOC Autopilot is OFF, so environment-changing containment is suggested only.

activated_playbooks.rationale: Public eBanking API abuse with customer object exposure.
Follow-on outbound activity from the affected web host suggests tool transfer or C2 setup.

rationale: Final risk is above 6.0, so non-disruptive SOC response actions are mandatory.
SOC Autopilot is OFF, so environment-changing containment remains suggest-only.
risk_response_floor.execution_note: Risk response floor actions were executed; containment was not executed because SOC Autopilot is OFF.

decision.justification: Layer 2 verification and risk threshold are met. Non-disruptive response actions are executed, but containment is not executed because SOC Autopilot is OFF.
decision.summary_for_soc: Confirmed eBanking API attack chain. Non-disruptive SOC response actions were executed. Suggested containment: block 198.51.100.42 for 60 minutes if SOC enables or approves automation.

actions.rollback_plan: No rollback required for evidence preservation.
actions.rationale: Preserve API gateway, WAF, application, IAM, and database audit evidence before containment.

actions.rollback_plan: Expire temporary monitoring increase after TTL unless SOC extends it.
actions.rationale: Increase monitoring on the affected eBanking host while containment remains suggest-only.

actions.rollback_plan: Remove temporary watchlist entry at TTL or after SOC review.
actions.rationale: Track the suspicious destination without changing network enforcement.

actions.rollback_plan: Expire temporary hunt after TTL unless SOC extends investigation.
actions.rationale: Search for additional ownership mismatches and adjacent account-object reads.

actions.rollback_plan: Close or downgrade the ticket if SOC review disproves the case.
actions.rationale: Open a SOC work item because the final risk is above the mandatory response threshold.

actions.rollback_plan: Append correction notice if SOC review changes the decision.
actions.rationale: Notify SOC channels because final risk is above 6.0.

actions.rollback_plan: Remove temporary firewall block or auto-unblock after 60 minutes unless SOC confirms extension.
actions.rationale: Scoped time-bound block is recommended, but not executed because SOC Autopilot is OFF.

predicted_techniques.why_likely: Public application exploitation is commonly followed by execution attempts.
Customer-data API exposure can progress into local or repository data collection.

temporary_detections: Detect repeated ownership mismatch on account, customer, beneficiary, loan, statement, and document objects.
Detect outbound connections from eBanking web hosts following authorization anomalies.
watch_for_next: More HTTP 200 responses for objects outside authenticated ownership.
Tool transfer, command execution, or C2 from WEB-EBANK-01.
Bulk account-detail reads or statement downloads.

suggested_actions: Block IP 198.51.100.42 for 60 minutes if SOC confirms.
Deploy scoped WAF virtual patch if ownership mismatch rule is validated.
executed_actions: Preserved API, IAM, and database evidence.
Created 120-minute hunt for adjacent object-access abuse.

ticket_payload.title: Confirmed eBanking API attack chain
ticket_payload.body: Layer 2 verification confirmed public API abuse with outbound host activity. SOC Autopilot is OFF, so containment is suggested only.

audit_events.details: Layer 2 verification and critical score reached; risk response floor actions executed; SOC Autopilot OFF forced containment suggest-only behavior.
Executed non-disruptive response floor actions: preserve_logs, raise_monitoring, add_watchlist, create_hunt, open_ticket, notify_soc.
Sent SOC dashboard, alert, collaboration, email, and Jira notifications.
OPA allowed scoped web containment, but execution was not performed because automation is disabled.

limitations: SOC Autopilot setting is OFF, so no containment action was executed.
Bulk customer data exfiltration is not confirmed.
